name: Ideal Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Make your own sauce with meat or use a large jar of Ragu and add meat to it.
2. Mix ricotta with eggs, salt, and pepper.
3. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions, 15-20 minutes. Drain.
4. Lightly cover the bottom of a casserole dish (12x9 pan) with meat sauce.
5. Alternate layers as follows: Lasagna, Ricotta, Lasagna, grated eggs and sauce.
6. Continue layering, ending with Lasagna and top with Mozzarella cheese slices.
7. Sprinkle additional meat sauce on top.
8. Bake in oven at 350°F for about 30 minutes. For a more cheesier lasagna, place a layer of Mozzarella between each layer and also on top.
